basicInfo.name: Nightmare Kai
basicInfo.flavor: Kai the Saber Tiger was recognized for his experience in fighting various beasts and hunters, and was chosen as the leader of the beasts.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 90% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Savage Bite
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 245% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Bleed [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 245% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Tiger's Roar
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 80% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Defense Reduction. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - All Allies
 - Grants Damage Boost. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 80% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Frosted Fangs
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Physical Attack Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]

profile.story:
A saber tiger beastkin that hunts other hunters for a living.
He was granted power by Queen Lania to keep peace in the Blizzard Plains. Anything he bites will be frozen solid.
Long ago, he killed Snipper's parents.
He'd been dismissive of the young hunter's abilities, but he met his end at Snipper's hands.
